user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: Structured learning project to improve piano skills with daily practice routines (scales, technique, repertoire).

result.reasoning: User requested a new learning project; append it to the existing Learning section. The project is named and described to capture the goal of getting better at piano. (Add tasks such as a daily 30-minute scales practice task inside this project in a follow-up create operation.)
